pages.name: Home
pages.description: Corporate homepage for the amusement machines manufacturer, highlighting key product categories, services, and quick access to core tools.
primary_functions: Provide quick entry points to main product categories such as basketball & sports, racing, redemption, cranes, and air hockey.
Expose shortcuts to quote list, project list, support, distributor locator, events, financing, and newsletter signup.
Promote upcoming trade shows and on-site demo opportunities with links to event detail pages.
Highlight financing offers and featured machines to drive deeper product exploration.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a featured product category tile or Products shortcut on the homepage
Click on a featured machine card in the homepage featured products section
Click on 'View all events' from the upcoming events highlight
Click on the primary highlighted trade show card on the homepage
Click on the financing teaser 'Learn more' or 'Estimate payments' button on the homepage
Click on the quote cart icon or 'Quote List' shortcut in the homepage header strip
Click on 'Plan my arcade' or the 'Project List' shortcut on the homepage
Click the 'Support' quick link block in the homepage support ribbon
Click the 'Where to Buy' teaser on the homepage
Click the 'Sign up for our newsletter' call-to-action in the homepage footer band

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry labeled 'Home'
Users can land directly via the root URL or external campaigns pointing to index.html

pages.name: Product Listing / Category
pages.description: Category and search result page showing a grid of arcade machines with filters and sorting.
primary_functions: Display products for a selected category (e.g., basketball_sports_games, racing_driving, ticket_redemption_games, prize_cranes_merchandisers, air_hockey_table_games).
Allow filtering by attributes such as players, power/voltage (e.g., 110V), width, and price range.
Provide sorting options including price low-to-high and newest products.
Let users open individual product detail pages from product cards via clicks on image or title.

incoming_params.description: ProductCategory.code indicating which category to display (e.g., 'basketball_sports_games', 'racing_driving', 'all_products'). Used to load category header and initial product list.
Optional search query used to filter products when navigating from a global search box.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a product card in the category grid
Click on 'View quote list' or the quote cart icon after adding products to quote from the listing
Click on 'View project list' after adding machines to the project/wish list from the listing

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry labeled 'Products' linking to products.html?categoryId=all_products
Access specific categories via categoryId query parameter from hero/category links
Linked from contextual CTAs such as 'Browse all basketball games'

pages.name: Product Detail
pages.description: Detailed page for a single amusement machine with specifications, media, and conversion actions.
primary_functions: Show full product information including technical specs (players, power/voltage, width, price range, category, model name).
Enable users to add the machine to the quote list via an 'Add to quote' button.
Enable users to add the machine to their project/wish list via an 'Add to project' or equivalent button.
Provide breadcrumbs and links back to the originating product listing/category page.
Link to relevant support resources or manuals when available (e.g., installation manuals).

incoming_params.description: Product.id of the machine to display details for.
Optional ProductCategory.code used to build the breadcrumb and 'Back to category' link.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the breadcrumb link pointing back to the product's category listing
Click 'View quote list' or the quote cart icon after adding this product to the quote list
Click 'View project list' after adding this product to the project/wish list
Click 'View all manuals' link in the product support resources section
Click 'Request service for this model' button in the support section of the product page
Click 'Estimate monthly payments' button on the product page

access_methods.description: Accessed via product.html?id=PRODUCT_ID links from listings, homepage, or manuals.
Linked from search results, support resources, and promotional content.

pages.name: Quote List & Request
pages.description: Quote cart page showing machines selected for quotation and a form to submit a quote request.
primary_functions: Display a list of all products added to the quote, with basic details and ability to adjust quantities or remove items.
Show total estimated value range (if applicable) to help users understand the scope of their quote.
Provide a 'Proceed to quote request' action that reveals or scrolls to a quote request form.
Collect quote request details including name, company, email, phone (optional), and project notes.
Submit the quote request and confirm that the inquiry has been sent to the sales team.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Continue browsing products' button after reviewing the quote list or submitting a request
Click optional 'Subscribe to updates' link on the quote confirmation message

access_methods.description: Persistent 'Quote List' link in the header navigation
Linked from 'View quote list' CTAs on product and product listing pages

pages.name: Project / Wish List
pages.description: Centralized project or wish list page used to plan mixed-machine arcade layouts.
primary_functions: Show a consolidated list of all machines added to the project/wish list from any category.
Allow users to review, reorder, and remove machines to refine their compact arcade lineup.
Let users add basic project metadata (project name, venue name, notes).
Provide a 'Save project' or equivalent action that stores the current list and confirms it has been saved for reference or export (e.g., printable view).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Add more machines' from the project overview

access_methods.description: Persistent 'Project List' link in the header navigation
Accessed from 'View project' CTAs on product and product listing pages

pages.name: Support Overview
pages.description: Landing page for service and support resources for arcade machine owners and operators.
primary_functions: Present key support pathways including manuals & downloads, technical support, and service requests.
Provide a prominent 'Request Service' or 'Book Maintenance' button linking to the service request form.
Link users to the manuals & downloads page for product documentation searches.
Offer basic contact information and guidance on how to get help for different types of issues.

incoming_params.description: Optional section anchor such as 'manuals' or 'service' to pre-focus the page on a specific support pathway.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Manuals & Downloads' card on the support overview
Click 'Request Service' or 'Book Maintenance' button on the support overview
Click 'Contact technical support' link for general support inquiries

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry labeled 'Support'
Footer link labeled 'Support'
Linked from contextual 'Need help?' prompts across the site

pages.name: Manuals & Downloads
pages.description: Searchable document library for product manuals, installation guides, and other technical downloads.
primary_functions: Allow users to search by model name or keyword (e.g., 'Galaxy Claw Pro').
Provide filters for document type (e.g., installation_manual, user_manual, wiring_diagram) and date range (e.g., last_2_years or specific years).
Offer sorting options such as newest_first or relevance for the document list.
Display document results and let users open a manual detail or download view (e.g., in-page panel or modal).
Provide a 'Download PDF' button or link on the selected manual entry to start the file download.

incoming_params.description: Optional search term (e.g., a product model name like 'Galaxy Claw Pro') used to pre-populate the search field.
Optional document type filter such as 'installation_manual' to pre-filter results.
Optional Product.id to bias search results towards manuals for a specific product.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View product page' within a manual detail panel (if the manual is linked to a product)

access_methods.description: Footer link labeled 'Manuals & Downloads'
Accessed via 'Manuals & Downloads' button on the Support Overview page
Direct links can deep-link to pre-filtered document lists using query parameters

pages.name: Service Request
pages.description: Online form to request technical service or on-site maintenance for amusement machines.
primary_functions: Allow users to select a service type such as on_site_maintenance from a dropdown.
Let users choose the product category (e.g., air_hockey_table_games) and then specific model (e.g., Air Storm Hockey) from dependent dropdowns.
Collect location or venue details for the machine installation (e.g., venue name and address).
Provide date and time pickers so users can choose specific service appointment slots.
Include a problem description field and contact details (name, phone, email), plus any required consent or terms checkboxes.
Submit the service request and display a confirmation message that the request was received.

incoming_params.description: Optional ProductCategory.code used to preselect the product category in the service request form.
Optional Product.id used to preselect the model in the service request form.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Support' link after submitting a service request

access_methods.description: Footer link labeled 'Request Service'
Accessed via 'Request Service' / 'Book Maintenance' button on Support Overview and product pages
Deep-linked with preselected model/category when opened from a specific product

pages.name: Distributor Locator
pages.description: Global 'Where to Buy' page for finding distributors and dealers by region, country, and city.
primary_functions: Enable users to select region and country (e.g., Europe and Germany) via dropdowns.
Provide a city or postal code search field (e.g., Berlin) plus a 'Find dealers' or search action.
Show results in both list and map formats, with clear indication of which distributors serve the specified location.
Allow users to click a distributor entry to open a dedicated distributor detail page with full contact information.

incoming_params.description: Optional region filter (e.g., 'europe') to preselect the region dropdown.
Optional country code (e.g., 'DE') used to preselect the country dropdown.
Optional city or postal code (e.g., 'Berlin') used to prefill the location search field.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a distributor entry in the results list or map

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry labeled 'Where to Buy'
Footer link labeled 'Where to Buy'
Can be deep-linked from marketing materials with prefilled region and country

pages.name: Distributor Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a specific distributor or dealer, including contact and inquiry options.
primary_functions: Display distributor contact details such as company name, address, phone, email, and website.
Show service area or territories (e.g., Berlin and surrounding regions).
Provide a 'Contact this distributor' or 'Send inquiry' button that opens an embedded contact form.
Offer a contact form that collects subject/topic (e.g., product_inquiry), message, user name, email, and optional phone.
Submit the inquiry and confirm that the message has been sent to the distributor.

incoming_params.description: Distributor.id used to load full distributor details.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to results' link on the distributor detail page

access_methods.description: Accessed via distributor_detail.html?id=DISTRIBUTOR_ID from locator results
May be linked directly by distributors from their own sites

pages.name: Events Listing
pages.description: Listing page for company news and events with focus on trade shows and demo opportunities.
primary_functions: Display upcoming and past events, with labels or filters to show only upcoming events.
Highlight trade show events that include on-site demos in their descriptions.
Allow users to click an event title to open its event detail page.
Prominently promote current or next major trade show to encourage demo bookings.

incoming_params.description: Optional filter to show events by status (e.g., 'upcoming', 'past'). Defaults to 'upcoming' when not provided.
Optional filter such as 'trade_show' to limit results to a specific type of event.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an event title or 'View details' button in the events list

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry labeled 'News & Events'
Footer link labeled 'Events'
Linked from homepage event highlights and other promotional banners

pages.name: Event Detail & Demo Registration
pages.description: Detailed event page for a specific trade show or event, including schedule and demo registration.
primary_functions: Provide full event details including dates, location, booth number, and description of on-site demos.
Offer a 'Book a demo' or 'Schedule a demo' button that reveals or scrolls to a registration form.
Allow users to choose a date from available event days and select a time slot (e.g., 2:00 PM).
Collect registrant information such as name, company, email, and area of interest (e.g., prize_cranes or family_entertainment_centers).
Submit the demo registration and confirm the booking request has been received.

incoming_params.description: Event.id of the event whose details and demo slots should be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to events' link on the event detail page

access_methods.description: Accessed via event_detail.html?eventId=EVENT_ID from the events listing or homepage event highlight
Can be linked from external trade show pages or email campaigns

pages.name: Financing & Calculator
pages.description: Financing information and calculator page to estimate payments and request financing options.
primary_functions: Explain available financing and leasing programs for arcade machines.
Provide a financing calculator where users can enter equipment price (e.g., 18000) and select different terms (e.g., 36_months, 48_months).
Calculate and display estimated monthly payments for the selected terms.
Show a comparison view of multiple term options side by side (e.g., 36 vs 48 months) and highlight which has the lower monthly payment.
Allow users to select a preferred financing plan and submit a short financing inquiry form with name, company, and email.

incoming_params.description: Optional equipment price used to prefill the financing calculator amount field.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Contact financing team' link in the financing FAQ section

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry labeled 'Financing'
Footer link labeled 'Financing'
Linked from product pages via 'Estimate payments' calls-to-action

pages.name: Newsletter Signup
pages.description: Dedicated page for subscribing to the company's email newsletter with market segment preferences.
primary_functions: Collect subscriber name and email address.
Allow users to select market segments or interests via checkboxes, including family_entertainment_centers and bowling_centers.
Provide an email frequency dropdown (e.g., monthly, quarterly) and allow users to choose monthly.
Offer an optional comments or preferences field for additional notes such as desired update types.
Include a checkbox to accept the privacy policy or terms, and submit the newsletter registration.

incoming_params.description: Optional email address used to prefill the newsletter signup form when linked from other forms.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Privacy Policy' link next to the consent checkbox

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry labeled 'Newsletter'
Footer link labeled 'Newsletter'
Linked from newsletter call-to-action areas across the site and form confirmations

pages.name: About
pages.description: Corporate profile page describing the amusement machines manufacturer.
primary_functions: Present company history, mission, and expertise in arcade and amusement machines.
Highlight manufacturing capabilities, quality standards, and key product families.
Introduce leadership, milestones, and global presence.
Link to related pages such as distributor locator, events, and contact.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Find a distributor' link in the global presence section
Click 'See where to meet us next' link in the events / trade shows section
Click 'Contact us' link at the end of the About page

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry labeled 'Company' linking to About
Footer link labeled 'About'
Often linked from corporate profiles, directories, and social media

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: General contact page for inquiries not covered by specific quote, service, or distributor forms.
primary_functions: Display corporate contact details including address, phone numbers, and general email.
Provide a simple enquiry form for general questions, partnership opportunities, or media requests.
Allow users to select a topic (e.g., general_question, media, partnership) to route the inquiry.
Confirm successful submission of the contact form.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Also sign me up for the newsletter' link or checkbox on the contact confirmation

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry labeled 'Contact'
Footer link labeled 'Contact'
Linked from email signatures, online profiles, and support documentation

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Legal page describing how user data, cookies, and communications are handled.
primary_functions: Explain how personal data from quote requests, service forms, newsletters, and other tools is collected, stored, and used.
Describe cookie usage, analytics, and tracking practices.
Outline user rights regarding data access, correction, and deletion.
Provide contact information for privacy-related requests.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a 'Contact our data protection officer' or similar link within the Privacy Policy

access_methods.description: Footer link labeled 'Privacy Policy'
Linked from consent text next to forms and sign-ups across the site

pages.name: Terms of Use
pages.description: Legal page covering terms and conditions for using the website and its tools.
primary_functions: Define acceptable use of the website, tools, and downloadable resources.
Outline disclaimers, limitations of liability, and intellectual property notices.
Specify governing law and dispute resolution information.
Reference related policies such as the privacy policy.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Privacy Policy' cross-reference link inside the Terms of Use

access_methods.description: Footer link labeled 'Terms of Use'
Linked from legal and compliance-related communications

header_links.description: Homepage with product highlights and quick access to key tools
Browse all amusement machines by category with filters and sorting
Technical support overview including manuals and service requests
Company news, trade shows, and demo opportunities
Financing options and payment calculator for arcade machines
About the manufacturer, history, and capabilities
General contact information and inquiry form
View and submit a quote request for selected machines
View and save your arcade project or wish list
Subscribe to the newsletter with market segment preferences

footer_links.description: Searchable library of manuals and technical documents
Book maintenance or technical service for machines
Learn how your data is handled
Website usage terms and legal information
